instruction: I'm attempting to retrieve a value from a table in Excel using two criteria with INDEX and MATCH functions, but my formula isn’t working and returns an error. I have included an example in the attached Excel file for reference. I use =INDEX(Snapshot!C3:AY4,MATCH(1,(Inventory!A2=Snapshot!B3:B4)*(Inventory!B2=Snapshot!C2:AY2),0)). Using the corrected formula, get the value from the table in the ‘Snapshot’ sheet to column C of sheet1, corresponding to the values in column A and B. Present the output values as numbers and retain the order of the sheets same as the input file.
